{% extends "vendor/vendor_base.html" %} {% block vendor_content %}
{% if notifications %}
Sale Notifications
{% for n in notifications %}
{{ n.sale.title }}
{{ n.sale.banner_text }} — Sale runs {{ n.sale.start_datetime|date:"M d, Y H:i" }} to {{ n.sale.end_datetime|date:"M d, Y H:i" }}
Received {{ n.created_at|date:"M d, Y" }}
{% endfor %}
{% endif %}
Active & Upcoming Sales
{% if active_sales %} {% for sale in active_sales %}
{{ sale.title }}
{{ sale.banner_text }}
{{ sale.start_datetime|date:"M d, Y H:i" }} → {{ sale.end_datetime|date:"M d, Y H:i" }}
{% if sale.is_live %}🔴 Live {% else %}⏳ Upcoming{% endif %}
{% if sale.description %}
{{ sale.description }}
{% endif %} {% with existing=my_ads %} {% for ad in existing %}{% if ad.sale.id == sale.id %}
Your Submitted Ads for This Sale
{{ ad.product.name }}
Price: ₹{{ ad.sale_price }}  |  Qty: {{ ad.quantity }}
{% if ad.note %}
“{{ ad.note }}”
{% endif %}
{% if ad.is_approved %} Approved {% else %} Pending Review {% endif %}
{% endif %}{% endfor %} {% endwith %}
Submit Ad for This Sale
{% endfor %} {% else %}
No active or upcoming sales at the moment.
{% endif %}
{% endblock %}
